content_body: We came up from Charleston, South Carolina, for a much needed getaway from our stressful jobs. We absolutley loved the cabin inside and out. The pool table was undoubtedly the biggest hit, along with venturing downhill to soak in all the sights and sounds - it all was quite therapeutic. This was actually our first family vacation in about ten years and the warmth and atmosphere of this cabin/area has already inspired us to plan our next family vacation for next year! Thank you so much for the wonderful time!
title: Therapeutic Experience in Blue Ridge, GA
